creator: instructionset@gmail.com
text:
Officially PHP say not to use mod_php with anything but prefork mpm in apache. I believe it is specific to mod_php rather than php and threads in general. I'm not sure how often zts is actually used and if debug+zts works on other platforms. I'll try to investigate. My best guess is it isn't specific to FreeBSD.  

https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.unix.apache2.php
